items.name: Piper
items.doc: Safe Rust wrapper around the piper C API.

items.name: new
items.signature: pub fn new( model_path: &Path, espeak_data_path: &Path, ) -> Result<Self, String>
items.doc: Create a new Piper synthesizer from model files.

items.name: default_options
items.doc: Get default synthesis options for this voice.

items.name: synthesize
items.signature: pub fn synthesize( &self, text: &str, options: Option<&PiperSynthesizeOptions>, ) -> Result<(Vec<f32>, i32), String>
items.doc: Synthesize text to a Vec of f32 samples. Returns (samples, sample_rate).
